summary: Computer Science undergraduate at UMass Amherst with hands-on experience in full-stack development and applied AI/ML. Specialized in semantic search systems, LLM fine-tuning, and vector-based retrieval pipelines, with production projects deployed for real university departments. Strong foundation in Python, React, and NLP tooling.

experience.title: Undergraduate Course Assistant (UCA) – CS 240
experience.company: Manning College of CICS, UMass Amherst
achievements: Led discussion sessions and office hours for 250+ students in CS 240, reinforcing Bayesian Networks, Markov Chains, and statistical inference through structured problem-solving exercises
Evaluated 500+ student submissions across full grading cycles spanning homework, quizzes, and exams covering probability theory and Bayesian inference

experience.title: Orientation Leader
experience.company: New Student and Family Programs, UMass Amherst
achievements: Guided 6,300+ incoming students and 2,500 family members through multi-day orientation programming across a high-volume summer session
Led diverse groups through structured activities and time-sensitive conflict resolution, managing competing priorities across simultaneous sessions

experience.title: Intern Programmer
achievements: Developed core game logic and collision systems for 3 platformer titles in Construct 3, extending gameplay behaviors with custom JavaScript to reduce average bug resolution time by 30%
Integrated sprite animations and graphical assets across multiple game builds, maintaining consistent cross-platform performance on both desktop and mobile targets

projects.name: Agentic Grant Scout
highlights: Deployed a full-stack semantic search app adopted by the UMass Amherst Chemistry department as their primary federal grant discovery tool, built on a React + PHP 8 + MySQL production stack
Automated nightly ingestion of 500+ federal grants via the Grants.gov API, generating Gemini-powered embeddings stored in MySQL for cosine similarity-based retrieval across the full opportunity pool

Built a two-stage ranking pipeline that filters grants by cosine similarity then re-ranks the top 15 via a Gemini LLM pass scoring research alignment, eligibility, and career stage per faculty CV upload

projects.name: Echo-Locator
highlights: Architected a cross-modal semantic search engine using OpenAI CLIP to project lost-item images and natural language queries into a unified vector space, enabling description-based photo retrieval without keyword matching

Designed and shipped a full-stack lost-and-found platform (CLIP embedding pipeline, SQLite vector store, React frontend) as a 2-person team in 36 hours, targeting UMass's fragmented building-level recovery infrastructure

projects.name: Semantic LLM Cache
highlights: Built a semantic caching layer for DistilGPT-2 using SentenceTransformers embeddings, returning cached responses for any query exceeding an 80% cosine similarity threshold
Cut average response time by ~95% (2.0s → <0.1s) by serving matches from a SQLite vector store, bypassing full model inference

projects.name: Campus LLM Fine-Tuning
highlights: Fine-tuned TinyLlama-1.1B on a curated UMass Q&A dataset using FP16 mixed precision and deployed via Gradio as a real-time browser-accessible campus chatbot requiring zero technical setup

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

certifications: Practical Offensive Hacking – Illinois Institute of Technology (IIT), 2023
